name: sidebar-rsc
visual_summary: A compact, collapsible vertical panel providing easy access to frequently-used resources and features, often used in applications with large dashboards or menus. It is commonly placed on the left or right side of the screen. This component is ideal for applications with a wide array of functionality.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready sidebar component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-rsc
Description: A compact, collapsible vertical panel providing easy access to frequently-used resources and features, often used in applications with large dashboards or menus. It is commonly placed on the left or right side of the screen. This component is ideal for applications with a wide array of functionality.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. collapsible, responsive
Tags: sidebar, panel, menu

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
